title: cymbidium dayanum var. angustifolium
intro: Cymbidium dayanum var. angustifolium, also known as the Cymbidium orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium dayanum var. angustifolium include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
